channel.title: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme" - ANNOUNCE NEW TALES HERE! :D Please do not post sandbox links. Those go in the Drafts forum.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Moloch Mentality - Site-43 world tour goes to India, and has a crisis of conscience.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Out of Frame is now live.

While a Site Director works to try an abolish the Foundation Department of Photography, a member of the latter organization snaps their last pic.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Who Framed Ralph Roget? - Site-43 world tour goes to Italy, and meets underground fascist demons!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
The Drooling Path: Part 3 - the long-awaited third installment in my series about SCP-058, SCP-1981, and an unhinged researcher's dangerous quest to understand them, featuring a certain spooky hotel room.

Edit: fixed link. Something about the colon in the title made things screwy.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: A Story from A Future - The barriers into our universe is breaking, and the anomalous runs rampant. The overseer council will have to cross some boundaries to fix it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: A Working Theory - The Foundation tests out some new para technology. Let's see if it works…

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Character Development and Georgian Gothic - Site-43 world tour commences!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Its literal translation would be Barker, from the Russian verb "layat" (лаять), "to bark".

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Bear Flag Republic - A tale featuring the Obearwatch Command and California, written for this year's art exchange.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Announcing my tale that I wrote for Art Exchange, Melody For a Tortured Soul

Revolves around a MTF commander coming to terms with his past and learning to cope.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: RE: KTO-0001-Bellfather "Overwatch Council" - A tale of unlikely alliances in the face of fascism, and the Foundation they build.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
CactusCast

console.log("Are you calling me weak? Are you questioning my faith? Why don't you suck my ass? Why don't you suck my fucking ass? Why don't you feed me a years worth of bran muffins, and why don't you suck my ass?");

Pukae

Please be advised that the coffee machine has broken. Maintenance will begin at 9 AM.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Huron Carol - Christmastime in quarantine!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Never Fight a Land War in the Peloponnese

Sword-and-sandals action mythological history tale concerning a small cult's attempt to resist the Spartan war machine.

Another installment of my series but requires no real knowledge of the other parts to enjoy.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
What's this? Smapti's back! And he's brought Lord Blackwood with him!

Lord Blackwood Presents: A True Account of the Events of 1666.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
I did a substantial rewrite on a tale from a few months ago: Looking Forward

Middle part of my three part tale trilogy (as part of my Series): Hecatoncheires Cycle

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: A Broken Record: A tale about a series of events that has probably happened a thousand times over

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Secret Agents, a tale about a mind reader facing the UIU.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: A Closer Examination of SCP-173, a tale that's exactly what it sounds like. Compiles crosstest results, slathers them with a little logic, and draws some interesting conclusions.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Derek Kato needs government work Like a Hole in the Head, but a friend puts him in for an unorthodox interview at Beefbelly Bill's. Along the way, a series of coincidences preclude the Foundation from noticing his prior amnestic exposure, and a similar set of coincidences lead him to actually accept.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: T'ain't No Sin, where Olliefox realizes the error of his ways. …kinda.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: i say this that you suffer, a small tale about Halyna Ieva joining the Sarkic armies.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
i was a teenage shoggoth (Ween cover)

"You know, Hgan, it hurts to see your hold yourself back like that. Festering in that ancient skinsuit of yours. I miss the old Hgan, you know? Taking whatever he wanted, slaughtering whatever displeased him." When Orvo looked back up at Jack, he was smiling again. "I miss my brother, Hgan. I really, really do."

item.title: New Tale!
item.content:encoded:
A new tale starring a famous doctor.

Here it is.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
CANON RENAISSANCE AFTERMATH

"I still have duties to fulfill. For the Foundation. S-so that nothing like that ever happens again."

Isolated, Efficient. The epilogue to team .AIC's Limited Memory series.

item.title: IT'S SPOOKYDAY!!!!
item.content:encoded: I posted a new Parawatch Tale for spookyday!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Jesus Christ I'm bad about announcing tales.

Black Autumn IV h as started, and with it, six new tales have been put up:

  • A Tale in Which a Recap is Disguised as Character Interactions
  • Off the Road, Off the Rails
  • I Don't Want to Set the World on Fire
  • A Face Too Young to be Mine
  • Nobody Prays for February
  • Pre-Partum Anxieties

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: New Splinter tale in the Competitive Eschatology canon: Omens

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: flotsam

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Sariling Dugo't Bakal

A gay Mekhanite comes out to his Sarkic family

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Board Game A tale about SCP-3301 in the broken masquerade canon.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
NINEEIGHTNINENINENINE, the newest tale in WWYDFTLTIMD.

It was, once again, Lye who broke the silence. "… I miss this, Ash. Just… middle of the night, shooting the shit with you. It's… you're still my friend, right?"

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Poison Apples, tale about the diary of SCP-2599
My first article on the site, hope it's good!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
A Dove In A Chicken Pen, a tale from The Gulf.

Mr. Green smiled, and this time it reached its eyes. Somehow, that was worse. "Good to know you aren't a complete idiot, Father. This will make things… far more enjoyable."

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Winners Don't Do Drugs: a high school student becomes indebted to an eldritch being he meets online that agrees to sell him forbidden knowledge, learning a thing or two about stranger danger.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Nobody in Their Right Mind, the (non-contest) epilogue to Team Nobody's Winning's The Man in the White Suit series.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Everywhere, NY - 2nd entry of 4

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
#LetTheFactoryFail, a tale in Unfounded and part of the Wikidorks entries.

Deep within his billion dollar techno-chateau, science-auteur Elon Musk is mind-melding with his holographic twitter feed when Jeff Bezos texts him complaining about traffic delays re: 4D printer deliveries. Elon Musk's eyes glow as he suddenly screams to the internet: "TUNNELS"

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Bunch of announcements, coming in hot:

Necropotence - canon con 2020 entry hub page
Prelude - 1st entry of 4
Tip of the Spear - 3rd entry of 4

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
I rewrote and revised my tale, as I was not happy with it, so I announce it yet again.

You can read it here: http://www.scpwiki.com/ocular-variant

I hope you like and enjoy it :)

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Broken Bowe: Puttin' a bow on it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Big Fish In The Sky, - an Anomalous Items Tale and my first work on the site. Hope you guys like it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Asmodeus, an Unfounded tale and the 1st entry of the Wikidorks.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Bowe Decommission, Part Three: In which that's all, folks.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Life Everlasting, an End of Death tale.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Can You Show Me The Way To Alagadda?

The scherzando fades out of existence, not with a bang but a whimper.

A new entry in the On Mount Golgotha Canon for Crencon2020
Brought to you by team Overture, Scored for a Canon

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The Bowe Decommission, Part Two: In which a plan survives contact with the anomalies.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: The B&B Decommission: In which containment starts at home.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Forgot to announce but Mary Shelley’s Foundation has posted a Hub for our story series set in Resurrection canon, for CanCon2020:

http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/resurrection-new-faces-hub

Give it a gander :)

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Hello hello,

I would like to announce my first tale, and article on this site.

You can read it here: http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/eye-above-us

Greenlighted here: Idea Pitch/Proof of greenlight: http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/forum/t-13698664/eye-above-us, by Francis Scalia and Cerastes.

It´s a short tale about an idea I had, and which I would like to expand, too.

I sincerely hope you like it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Hello there! Time to show off my Tale for CrenCon!

Take Your Ship!

It's very Persona 5-inspired in terms of pacing and action.

It's an alternate take on the BRC where they don't immediately steal a ship after Phase 1 and, instead, follow a distress signal and steal a very different type of ship.

Think a bizarro Phase 1.5 with different events.

Be sure to listen to the posted music while you read!

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Hello! Veralta's here to present a new tale of deceit and journalistic honor for our AIAD series for CanRenCon. It's about a journalist being chased by Foundation AIs in a virtual world.

Printer's Misdirection

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded: Sun (Sister) and Moon (Champion): In space, everyone can hear you snicker.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Now that I'm sure that this page is successful… it's finally time to post something in an Announcement thread.

Him and the Other Him, the fourth installment of our "Bowe is back from the dead, there will be blood" series for Canon Renaissance Contest 2020, is up! Go read the story of "Him" (or SCP-093) who meet new faces in a new world after a defeat.

My first writing on the site after a big chunk of time here. I hope you'll like it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
http://scp-wiki.wikidot.com/a-transfer-of-responsibility

With 422's Project lead dead, the SCP is transferred into the care of the WWS

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Panspermia

His heat lingered on the deck for just a few days… and he was gone.

My first document, over a year in the making. I really hope you enjoy it.

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
CANON RENAISSANCE CONTEST 2020

A consciousness appears in the void between reality and unreality. A single mind floating in the darkness — as if willing herself into existence. A mind that knows.

Come read about the birth of Mnemosyne, an antimeme-detecting AIC.

Project RUBY

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Read the next entry in our team's canon about the Hanged King, literature, and the Wanderer's Library, penned by myself and Riemann.

Competitive Teleology

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Following on from the above, Team Nobody's Winning's second piece has about spies, dark forests and sinister goings-on in the wreckage of Berlin:

Chiaroscuro

item.title: Re: Tale Announcements 18: Parsley, Sage, Rosemary, and Thyme
item.content:encoded:
Hey, canon contest posting has opened, and so team Nobody's Winning finally got something to show.

If you like tales about panicked soldiers and chain-smoking 13 year olds, this one is for you:

Hello My Name Isn't
